name: Strokes N Drivers Indoor Golf
address: The Marketplace, 115 NW 6th St, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33311
about: Strokes N Drivers Indoor Golf is a facility in Fort Lauderdale offering indoor golf simulator experiences. The venue uses ProTee VX launch monitor technology with GSPro software to provide data-driven practice and play on over 500 virtual courses. It caters to golfers seeking a laid-back, professional atmosphere for practice, lessons, and social events, with a focus on accessibility and value. Membership options are available, starting at $20 per month, which includes benefits like discounted simulator hours and a free lesson.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level ProTee VX launch monitor provides detailed ball and club data for improvement
Laid-back, professional atmosphere suitable for both practice and social play
Affordable $20/month membership with exclusive benefits like free lessons and priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: Premium food and drink options available, including a craft cocktail bar and dedicated bourbon lounge
Full bar with craft cocktails and bourbon lounge; beverages provided by Center Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor system with AI-powered club data tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify a club rental policy, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The venue has its own full bar and kitchen serving premium food and craft cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round, as it depends on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Strokes N Drivers offers after-school youth golf clinics with Coach Jon for $25 per child, making it a kid-friendly environment.
